title: 8 fixes — Critical incoming-call cover, Wallet UX, iOS safe-area
notes: CRITICAL FIX: Incoming call modal now renders ABOVE the Moments viewer (was hidden behind it — user mid-moment couldn't answer or decline a ringing call)
FIX: Wallet card inputs now bring up the numeric keyboard on mobile (was full QWERTY — major friction for 16-digit card numbers)
FIX: Install prompt + notifications panel header now respect iPhone X+ safe-area (no more overlap with home indicator / status bar)
FIX: Moment viewer close 'unresponsive feel' window cut from 400ms to 80ms — snappier feed return
UX: Chat input now shows 'Send' button on iOS keyboard return key + autoCorrect + autoCapitalize sentences (matches WhatsApp/iMessage feel)
UX: People search input shows magnifier + autoCorrect off (right keyboard for search)
POLISH: Avatar drag preventDefault on touchStart blocks iOS Safari long-press image callout
POLISH: Incoming call modal avatar falls back to initials if the image URL 404s (was showing broken-image icon)
